esv_version: Enter his gates with thanksgiving, and his courts with praise! Give thanks to him; bless his name!
niv_version: Enter his gates with thanksgiving and his courts with praise; give thanks to him and praise his name.
reflection: God loves when we come to Him with happy thank-yous and praise. It makes our hearts feel close to Him. He is always glad to see us.
live_it_out:
1. Say thank you to God when you walk into a new place today.
2. Give Him a big smile and say "I praise You!"
3. Tell someone one thing you are thankful for.

esv_version: Give thanks to the LORD, for he is good.
niv_version: Give thanks to the LORD, for he is good.
reflection: God is so good to us every day. Saying thank you to Him makes us happy inside. His goodness never runs out.
live_it_out:
1. Say "Thank You, God, because You are good" three times today.
2. Look for one good thing God did and say thank you.
3. Share a thank-you with a friend.

esv_version: Oh give thanks to the LORD, for he is good.
niv_version: Give thanks to the LORD, for he is good.
reflection: God is good all the time. When we say thank you, it shows we notice His kindness. He loves our thankful hearts.
live_it_out:
1. Say thank you to God at breakfast, lunch, and dinner.
2. Draw a smiley face and write "God is good."
3. Tell a grown-up one way God is good to you.

esv_version: The LORD is good to all.
niv_version: The LORD is good to all.
reflection: God is kind to every person and every animal. His goodness is like sunshine for the whole world. You are part of that goodness.
live_it_out:
1. Notice one way God is good to you or someone else today.
2. Be good to a person or pet the way God is good to you.
3. Whisper "God is good to all" before bed.

esv_version: Oh give thanks to the LORD, for he is good.
niv_version: Give thanks to the LORD, for he is good.
reflection: Thanking God for His goodness is like giving Him a big hug with our words. It makes our hearts feel warm and happy.
live_it_out:
1. Say thank you to God for something nice today.
2. Give a thank-you hug to a family member.
3. Remember God is good even on cloudy days.

esv_version: I will bless the LORD at all times.
niv_version: I will extol the LORD at all times.
reflection: We can praise God all the time — when we play, eat, or go to bed. He loves hearing our happy words about Him.
live_it_out:
1. Say a little praise to God during playtime.
2. Whisper thank you to Him before meals.
3. Feel the happiness of praising Him.

esv_version: He put a new song in my mouth, a song of praise to our God.
niv_version: He put a new song in my mouth, a hymn of praise to our God.
reflection: God gives us new songs to sing about Him. They make our hearts light and full of praise. You can sing them anytime.
live_it_out:
1. Make up a little song about God today.
2. Sing it quietly to yourself.
3. Thank Him for the new song.

esv_version: Clap your hands, all peoples! Shout to God with loud songs of joy!
niv_version: Clap your hands, all you nations; shout to God with cries of joy.
reflection: God loves when we clap and shout happy songs to Him. It shows how glad we are that He is our God.
live_it_out:
1. Clap your hands and shout a happy "Yay God!"
2. Dance a little while praising Him.
3. Feel the joy bubbling inside.

esv_version: Shout for joy to God, all the earth!
niv_version: Shout for joy to God, all the earth!
reflection: The whole earth can shout happy praises to God. You are part of that big happy song. He hears your voice and loves it.
live_it_out:
1. Shout a joyful "Praise God!" today.
2. Tell the sky or trees how much you love Him.
3. Smile big while you do it.

esv_version: Oh come, let us sing to the LORD; let us make a joyful noise to the rock of our salvation!
niv_version: Come, let us sing for joy to the LORD; let us shout aloud to the Rock of our salvation.
reflection: God invites us to sing and make joyful noise to Him. He is our strong Rock who saves us. Singing to Him feels so good.
live_it_out:
1. Sing a happy song to God right now.
2. Make joyful noise with your voice.
3. Remember He is your strong Rock.

esv_version: Oh sing to the LORD a new song, for he has done marvelous things!
niv_version: Sing to the LORD a new song, for he has done marvelous things.
reflection: God has done wonderful things, so we can sing a brand-new song to Him. His marvelous works are all around us.
live_it_out:
1. Make up a new song about something God did.
2. Sing it with a happy heart.
3. Thank Him for His marvelous things.

esv_version: Praise the LORD! Sing to the LORD a new song.
niv_version: Praise the LORD. Sing to the LORD a new song.
reflection: Praise the Lord and sing Him a new song. He loves fresh praises from our happy hearts. It brings us close to Him.
live_it_out:
1. Start your day with a new praise song.
2. Sing it softly to God.
3. Feel how close He feels.

esv_version: Let not steadfast love and faithfulness forsake you.
niv_version: Let love and faithfulness never leave you.
reflection: God wants us to keep love and faithfulness close to our hearts. They are like best friends that never leave. He helps us hold on to them.
live_it_out:
1. Show love to someone today.
2. Keep a promise you make.
3. Ask God to help you be faithful.

esv_version: Whoever is kind to the poor lends to the LORD.
niv_version: Those who are kind benefit themselves, but the cruel bring ruin on themselves.
reflection: Being kind to others is like lending kindness to God Himself. He sees every gentle act and smiles. Kindness makes our hearts feel good.
live_it_out:
1. Do one kind thing for someone today.
2. Share something small with a friend.
3. Remember God sees your kindness.

esv_version: Anxiety in a man's heart weighs him down, but a good word makes it glad.
niv_version: Anxiety weighs down the heart, but a kind word cheers it up.
reflection: Kind words can lift a heavy heart and make it glad again. God gives us good words to share. Our kind words are powerful.
live_it_out:
1. Say one kind word to someone today.
2. Cheer up a friend with a nice note.
3. Ask God for good words to share.

esv_version: A glad heart makes a cheerful face.
niv_version: A happy heart makes the face cheerful.
reflection: When our heart is glad, our face shows a big smile. God loves our cheerful face. A happy heart comes from Him.
live_it_out:
1. Smile big and let your heart be glad.
2. Think of something that makes you happy in God.
3. Share your cheerful smile.

esv_version: A joyful heart is good medicine.
niv_version: A cheerful heart is good medicine.
reflection: A joyful heart is like medicine that makes us feel better. God gives us joy that heals and helps. It is the best medicine.
live_it_out:
1. Choose joy today even if things are hard.
2. Laugh or giggle with a friend.
3. Thank God for the medicine of joy.

esv_version: Those who know your name put their trust in you.
niv_version: Those who know your name trust in you.
reflection: When we know God’s name, we can trust Him completely. He is safe and good. Trusting Him makes us feel peaceful.
live_it_out:
1. Say "I trust You, God" today.
2. Remember His name when you worry.
3. Feel peaceful because He is trustworthy.

esv_version: Good and upright is the LORD.
niv_version: Good and upright is the LORD.
reflection: God is good and always does what is right. We can count on Him to be fair and kind. His goodness is steady.
live_it_out:
1. Say "God is good and upright" out loud.
2. Try to do what is right like He does.
3. Thank Him for being good.

esv_version: From the rising of the sun to its setting, the name of the LORD is to be praised.
niv_version: From the rising of the sun to the place where it sets, the name of the LORD is to be praised.
reflection: From morning until night, we can praise the Lord’s name. Every sunrise and sunset is a chance to say thank you. He is worthy all day long.
live_it_out:
1. Praise God when you see the sun rise or set.
2. Say His name with thanks during the day.
3. Feel the joy of praising Him all day.

esv_version: Give thanks to the LORD, for he is good, for his steadfast love endures forever.
niv_version: Give thanks to the LORD, for he is good. His love endures forever.
reflection: God is good and His love lasts forever and ever. We can thank Him because His love never stops. It is a forever promise.
live_it_out:
1. Say "Thank You, God, for Your forever love" today.
2. Repeat it at bedtime.
3. Feel safe in His endless love.

esv_version: The LORD is good to all.
niv_version: The LORD is good to all.
reflection: God is good to every single person and creature. His goodness is for everyone. You are included in that big, kind goodness.
live_it_out:
1. Notice one way God is good to you today.
2. Be good to someone else.
3. Whisper "God is good to all."

esv_version: Great is our Lord, and abundant in power; his understanding is beyond measure.
niv_version: Great is our Lord and mighty in power; his understanding has no limit.
reflection: Our Lord is great and very strong. He understands everything perfectly. We can trust His big, wise heart.
live_it_out:
1. Say "You are great and strong, God."
2. Ask Him to help you understand something.
3. Feel safe because He knows everything.

esv_version: They who wait for the LORD shall renew their strength.
niv_version: Those who hope in the LORD will renew their strength.
reflection: When we wait and hope in God, He gives us fresh strength. It is like getting new energy from Him. He never runs out.
live_it_out:
1. When you feel tired, say "I hope in You, God."
2. Wait quietly for His strength.
3. Feel new energy coming.

esv_version: Take my yoke upon you, and learn from me, for I am gentle and lowly in heart.
niv_version: Take my yoke upon you and learn from me, for I am gentle and humble in heart.
reflection: Jesus is gentle and humble. He invites us to learn from Him and walk beside Him. His way feels light and kind.
live_it_out:
1. Ask Jesus to teach us something gentle today.
2. Be gentle with our words and hands.
3. Feel close to His humble heart.

esv_version: May the God of endurance and encouragement grant you to live in harmony.
niv_version: May the God who gives endurance and encouragement give you the same attitude of mind toward each other.
reflection: God gives us endurance and encouragement so we can get along with others. He helps us live in happy harmony.
live_it_out:
1. Get along nicely with your family today.
2. Encourage a friend with kind words.
3. Thank God for helping us get along.

esv_version: Rejoice in the Lord always; again I will say, rejoice.
niv_version: Rejoice in the Lord always. I will say it again: Rejoice!
reflection: We can rejoice in the Lord every single day. Even when things are hard, He gives us reasons to be glad. Joy is always possible with Him.
live_it_out:
1. Say "I rejoice in the Lord" today.
2. Find one reason to be glad right now.
3. Share your joy with someone.

esv_version: Put on then, as God's chosen ones, holy and beloved, compassionate hearts, kindness, humility, meekness, and patience.
niv_version: Therefore, as God’s chosen people, holy and dearly loved, clothe yourselves with compassion, kindness, humility, gentleness and patience.
reflection: God chose us and loves us dearly. He asks us to wear compassion, kindness, humility, gentleness, and patience like clothes. They fit us perfectly.
live_it_out:
1. Be kind and gentle today.
2. Show patience when waiting.
3. Remember we are God’s chosen ones.

esv_version: You are a chosen race, a royal priesthood, a holy nation, a people for his own possession.
niv_version: You are a chosen people, a royal priesthood, a holy nation, God’s special possession.
reflection: We are chosen, royal, holy, and God’s very own special children. He picked us to belong to Him. That makes us so loved and important.
live_it_out:
1. Say "I am God’s special child" today.
2. Walk like a royal prince or princess.
3. Thank God for choosing us.

esv_version: Little children, let us not love in word or talk but in deed and in truth.
niv_version: Dear children, let us not love with words or speech but with actions and in truth.
reflection: God wants us to show love with real actions, not just words. True love does kind things. He helps us love that way.
live_it_out:
1. Show love with a helpful action today.
2. Do something kind without being asked.
3. Remember love is shown in what we do.

esv_version: The LORD is my strength and my song.
niv_version: The LORD is my strength and my defense; he has become my salvation.
reflection: The Lord is our strength and the song in our hearts. He makes us strong and gives us reasons to sing. We can lean on Him.
live_it_out:
1. Say "The Lord is my strength and my song."
2. Sing a happy song about Him.
3. Feel strong because He is with us.
